---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for NiftyWall
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## 🚀 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 🎯 Use Case

Describe the problem or workflow this feature would solve or improve.

## 💡 Proposed Solution

If you have a specific implementation in mind, describe it here.

## 📋 Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches or features you've considered.

## 🖥️ Environment

- **NiftyWall Version:** (e.g., v3.3.0)
- **Deployment:** Docker / Bare Metal

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references here.
